name: autonomous-agent
description: Lightweight, modular AI agent framework optimized for local LLMs

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agent/core run build && pnpm --filter @agent/server run build && pnpm --filter @tailored-ai/cli run build && pnpm --filter @agent/ui run build && pnpm --filter @agent/site run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @agent/core run build && pnpm --filter @agent/server run build && pnpm --filter @tailored-ai/cli run dev
scripts.dev:msg: pnpm --filter @agent/core run build && pnpm --filter @agent/server run build && pnpm --filter @tailored-ai/cli run dev -- --message
